$comment: Policy for verifying base image signatures with cosign.

$schema_description.policies: Images with sigstore signatures. Matched by image-name prefix (startswith). Each entry specifies the cosign OIDC issuer and certificate-identity regex to require.
$schema_description.unsigned: Images we knowingly cannot verify with sigstore today. Listed explicitly (rather than silent-skip) so that any new base image defaults to failing the check until someone makes a conscious decision.

policies.name: Chainguard wolfi-base
policies.reason: Every Chainguard image digest is cosign keyless-signed by the chainguard-images release workflow. Verify per https://edu.chainguard.dev/chainguard/chainguard-images/how-to-use/verifying-chainguard-images-and-metadata-signatures-with-cosign/.

unsigned.reason: Docker Hub official images do not publish sigstore signatures we can verify in CI; relying on digest pinning + Renovate digest bumps + the Trivy scan instead.
